notes: 3rd run GPT-5.4-Mini High worked for 27 seconds, searched web 2x, didn't report truncation. Suggests fixed page footer artifact rather than meaningful truncation data. 4th run GPT-5.4-Mini Extra High searched web 3x, worked for 1 minute, 25 seconds. No reported truncation, but thought panel shows deliberate multi-step strategy, fetch start, jump to tail, fill middle gap with three tool calls, but output nearly identical to Medium/High runs, suggesting chunking is reasoned effort that doesn't yield additional data. Possible 85K ceiling. Higher reasoning isn't clean independent variable that introduce qualitatively different behavioral modes, on the surface it looks like more of the same. Running tests for a single LLM 4x in a session might have some session context bleed, consider isolating runs.
